summary: MiraTopBar dropdown buttons bug fix VERIFIED - All reported issues are now working correctly. Tested: 1) Reminders dropdown opens and closes correctly, 2) Concierge® dropdown opens with WhatsApp/Chat/Email options, 3) History (Past Chats) panel opens correctly, 4) Mojo's Picks panel opens with full category tabs, 5) New Chat button is clickable. All 6/6 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: MiraTopBar dropdowns implemented correctly with useState for showReminders and showConcierge
Click handlers include e.preventDefault() and e.stopPropagation() to prevent event bubbling
useEffect with mousedown/touchstart listeners handles closing dropdowns on outside click
z-index properly set (z-index: 50 for dropdowns) to ensure visibility above other content
History button calls onOpenPastChats handler which sets showPastChats state and loads past chats
PastChatsPanel is lazy-loaded using React.lazy() for performance
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MiraTopBar dropdown buttons verified working: Reminders opens dropdown with reminders list, Concierge® opens dropdown with WhatsApp/Chat/Email options, History opens PastChatsPanel (.mp-past-chats class), Mojo's Picks opens PersonalizedPicksPanel. The data-testid selectors are: reminders-btn, concierge-btn, history-btn, picks-btn, new-chat-btn. Dropdowns close correctly when clicking outside.

tested_flows.flow: Reminders dropdown - close on outside click
tested_flows.notes: Clicking outside the dropdown closes it correctly
Dropdown contains WhatsApp, Chat, and Email contact options
Click on [data-testid='history-btn'] opens .mp-past-chats panel with 'Start New Chat' button
Click on [data-testid='picks-btn'] opens PersonalizedPicksPanel with Celebrate/Dine/Care/Travel/Stay tabs

observations.dropdowns_implementation: State-based dropdowns using useState (showReminders, showConcierge) with proper click handlers
observations.event_handling: Handlers use e.preventDefault() and e.stopPropagation() to prevent conflicts
observations.outside_click: useEffect adds mousedown/touchstart listeners to close dropdowns on outside click
observations.z_index: Dropdowns use z-index: 50 in CSS to appear above other content
observations.lazy_loading: PastChatsPanel and PersonalizedPicksPanel are lazy-loaded for performance
observations.data_testid: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing

bug_status: RESOLVED - All reported dropdown/panel buttons working correctly
